title: youngia formosana
intro: Youngia formosana, also known as Chinese crown daisy or Formosan youngia, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Youngia formosana is often used as a tea, tincture, or dried herb to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
